name: kacak-kurye-son-paket
description: Kacak Kurye: Son Paket mobile game.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap open android
scripts.android:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:bundle: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
